title: psychotria linearisepala var. subobtusa
intro: Psychotria linearisepala var. subobtusa, also known as the "Yellow Bird" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria linearisepala var. subobtusa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
